description: Current weather, 24hr temperature graph, and 7-day forecast. Data from Open-Meteo.

fields.label: Refresh
fields.help: How often to fetch fresh data (30 min = 1800).

fields.label: Latitude
fields.help: Override auto-detected location. Set both lat and lon.

fields.label: Longitude
fields.help: Override auto-detected location. Set both lat and lon.

fields.label: Location Name
fields.help: Custom label to show in the header (e.g. 'New York, NY').
